designConstraints: Two-column layout below TopBar: fixed left column (360px) for summary cards, flexible right column for expense list, 24px gap, 32px outer padding
Must use 8px spacing unit system (scale: 4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64px) from design tokens
Background uses background-primary token (#0F172A deep-navy); cards use surface-primary token (#1E293B navy-surface) with elevation level-1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))
Card border-radius: large (16px) for summary and donut chart cards; medium (10px) for expense rows
TopBar height: 64px, sticky, z-index: 1100 (sticky token), surface-primary background with border-default bottom border
NavigationTabs: three tabs (Dashboard, Add Expense, Insights) with gold-amber (#F59E0B) active underline (2px) sliding at 300ms normal duration
MonthSelector pill uses surface-elevated (#293548) background with silver-text, flanked by chevron icons; month navigation triggers 400ms counter animation on all amounts
BudgetSummaryCard: 24px internal padding, heading-1 (24px/700) for total spent amount, body (14px/400) for budget label, 8px tall ProgressBar with pill radius
ProgressBar fill color: teal-success (#14B8A6) when under 80%, gold-amber (#F59E0B) at 80–100%, coral-error (#F87171) when over budget; animates on load 600ms ease-out
BudgetStatusBadge: pill radius (9999), three states — teal-success bg+text 'On Track', gold-amber bg+text 'Heads Up', coral-error bg+text 'Over Budget'
CategoryDonutChart: 160px diameter, 24px stroke width, segments use Category color_hex values; center displays transaction count in heading-2 (16px/600) with label in small (11px/400)
CategoryLegend: vertical list max 6 rows, 10px colored circle + category name (body) + amount (label, right-aligned), 8px vertical gap between rows
ExpenseRow: surface-primary card with 16px padding, 8px gap between rows, 3px left border in category color_hex, 40px category icon circle, hover state uses surface-elevated at 150ms fast duration
CategoryFilterDropdown: pill chip (border-radius pill), surface-elevated background, silver-text, down chevron; dropdown z-index 1000; filter transition 150ms fade
ExpenseDetailPopover: 320px wide, surface-elevated background, elevation level-2 shadow (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)), medium radius (10px), z-index 1000, anchored right of clicked row
Delete confirmation uses text-only state change ('Confirm delete?') with 3-second auto-revert — no color-only indicator

EmptyState: centered in right column, outlined receipt icon (64px, muted-text), heading-2 label, body description, CTA button using cta-primary (gold-amber) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy) text
Content max-width: 1280px; at tablet breakpoint (768px) stacks to single column with 560px max-width
Focus ring: 2px gold-amber (cta-primary) outline with 2px offset on all interactive elements
Minimum touch target: 44px height × 44px width for all interactive elements
Typography uses DM Sans (display family) for headings and DM Mono (body family) for amounts and data values
Donut chart segment hover: expands 4px outward at 150ms fast duration with tooltip showing category name, amount, percentage
Settings gear icon: 20px, text-secondary (muted-text), opens SettingsDialog with overlay token background (rgba(0,0,0,0.65)) at z-index 1200
referencePatterns: Card-based data display pattern: surface-primary cards with elevation level-1 shadow on deep-navy background, consistent 24px internal padding
Two-column dashboard layout pattern: fixed-width summary sidebar (360px) + flexible content column, matching existing dashboard spec
Donut chart with centered stat pattern: used in CategoryDonutChart with CategoryLegend below, consistent with spending-insights CategoryAggregate display
Filter bar with active state indicators: CategoryFilterDropdown chip with active category highlight, single-select, instant fade transition
Row-level detail popover pattern: ExpenseDetailPopover anchored to clicked row, elevation level-2, dismiss on outside click or Escape
Budget health status badge pattern: three-state BudgetStatusBadge (On Track / Heads Up / Over Budget) using semantic color tokens with text labels — not color alone
Progressive disclosure delete confirmation: inline text state change with auto-revert, consistent with confirm-delete modal pattern in app
Empty state CTA pattern: centered illustration + heading + body + primary CTA button, consistent with EmptyState component used across app
Month navigation selector pattern: shared MonthSelector component appearing on dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights pages
Shared TopBar + NavigationTabs pattern: consistent across all three primary screens with sliding active tab underline
Reactive data display pattern: all amounts and chart segments re-render on month change with counter animation (400ms) and chart stagger (600ms)
Category color-coded row pattern: 3px left border accent using Category.color_hex, consistent with CategoryChipGrid pattern on add-expense
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves ~11:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy achieves ~8.5:1
BudgetStatusBadge must convey status via both color AND text label ('On Track', 'Heads Up', 'Over Budget') — never color alone
CategoryDonutChart must include role='img' with aria-label describing the data summary (e.g., 'Donut chart showing category breakdown for March 2026')
CategoryDonutChart must provide a text-based alternative (CategoryLegend) listing all categories with amounts and percentages
Chart tooltips on donut segment hover must be keyboard accessible — Tab navigates through segments, tooltip appears on focus
ExpenseDetailPopover must trap focus when open; Escape key dismisses; focus returns to triggering ExpenseRow on close
Delete confirmation flow must use text change ('Confirm delete?') not color change alone; auto-revert after 3 seconds prevents accidental deletion
All interactive elements (ExpenseRow, CategoryFilterDropdown, chevrons, NavigationTabs, BudgetStatusBadge) must have minimum 44×44px touch targets per design token touch_targets spec
Focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) outline with 2px offset on all focusable elements (cta-primary focus ring token)
Full keyboard navigation: Tab through all interactive elements, Enter/Space to activate, Escape to dismiss popovers and dialogs
CategoryFilterDropdown must have aria-label='Filter by category', aria-expanded state, and aria-haspopup='listbox'
ExpenseRow must have role='button' or be a semantic button element with aria-label including merchant name and amount (e.g., 'Starbucks Coffee, $4.50, Food & Dining, March 28')
ProgressBar must use role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin='0', aria-valuemax set to budget amount, and aria-label='Monthly budget progress'
MonthSelector chevrons must have aria-label='Previous month' and aria-label='Next month'
EmptyState CTA button must have descriptive aria-label='Add your first expense'
Respect prefers-reduced-motion: replace 600ms chart animations, 400ms counter animations, and 150ms hover transitions with instant renders; disable bounce effects and slide transitions
SettingsDialog must use role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby pointing to dialog title, and trap focus within modal while open
NavigationTabs must use role='tablist' with individual role='tab' elements, aria-selected state, and aria-controls pointing to tab panel content
Screen reader must announce budget status changes reactively when month changes (aria-live='polite' region on BudgetSummaryCard)
Category color dots in CategoryLegend and ExpenseRow left borders must be supplemented with visible category name text — color is never the sole differentiator
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency — drives ExpenseRow display, ExpenseDetailPopover content, and RecentExpensesList

Category entity: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order — drives CategoryDonutChart segments, CategoryLegend rows, ExpenseRow left border color and icon, CategoryFilterDropdown options
Budget entity: id, month, year, amount, currency — drives BudgetSummaryCard total/remaining display, ProgressBar fill width and color state, BudgetStatusBadge status calculation
PaymentMethod entity: id, name, type, icon, last_four — drives payment method display in ExpenseRow (e.g., 'Visa •••4821') and ExpenseDetailPopover detail row
CategoryAggregate (from /api/aggregates/categories): category_id, total_amount, transaction_count, percentage — drives CategoryDonutChart segment proportions and CategoryLegend amounts
GET /api/expenses (month, year, category_id, page, limit) — paginated expense list for RecentExpensesList with category filter support
GET /api/expenses/:id — single expense fetch for ExpenseDetailPopover pre-fill and edit navigation
DELETE /api/expenses/:id — expense deletion from ExpenseDetailPopover delete action
GET /api/categories — all categories for CategoryFilterDropdown options, CategoryDonutChart, CategoryLegend
GET /api/budgets (month, year) — monthly budget for BudgetSummaryCard and ProgressBar calculations
GET /api/payment-methods — payment methods for ExpenseRow and ExpenseDetailPopover display
GET /api/aggregates/categories (month, year) — category spending aggregates for CategoryDonutChart and CategoryLegend
